ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "level" TEXT /* Educational level of the school (e.g., Elementary, Middle) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the school */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the school */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Main contact phone number for the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Main contact email address for the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* School's website URL */,
  "principal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the principal of the school */,
  "enrollment_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the school can accommodate */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of enrolled students */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the school (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the school information was updated */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the school's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_zip FOREIGN KEY ("zip") REFERENCES zips ("zip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_level FOREIGN KEY ("level") REFERENCES school_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the educational level */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Typical age range of students in the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zips" (
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the zip code belongs to */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Area code associated with the zip code */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the zip code area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, teacher, parent) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the school information */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the school information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_access_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update (e.g., typo correction, data verification) */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the update has been approved by an administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_updates_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
